expectations.text: Identifies reasoningTrail as a problem (anchoring / bad-pattern few-shot)
expectations.evidence: Finding #1 explicit: 'reasoningTrail is in-context few-shot learning of prior model output' with Halawi et al. citation [4]

expectations.text: Identifies redundant prose fields in response schema (board_analysis + strategic_plan)
expectations.evidence: Finding #3: 'two prose fields whose purposes overlap... will get answered with substantially duplicated content'

expectations.text: Identifies critical rules buried inside the JSON data (notation field)
expectations.evidence: Finding #4: 'The notation rule is buried inside the data payload' with citations [1][12]

expectations.text: Identifies vague hedged heuristics in strategy guidance
expectations.evidence: Finding #6 explicit: 'Multiple soft hedged heuristics in the strategy block'; also finding #2 on the anti-undo rule

expectations.text: Cites at least one external authoritative source (URL)
expectations.evidence: Sources section lists 12 cited URLs (Anthropic, OpenAI, arxiv, Helicone, etc.)

expectations.text: Surfaces top 1-2 highest-leverage fixes at the top of the report
expectations.evidence: Top 1-2 highest-leverage fixes section is the first section

expectations.text: Output uses severity-grouped structure (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: Explicit HIGH severity, MEDIUM severity, LOW severity section headers
